case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. PEDRO MIGUEL GARCIA HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA HERNANDEZ, PEDRO MIGUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-12-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT PEDRO MIGUEL GARCIA HERNANDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE REPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA HERNANDEZ, PEDRO MIGUEL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT PEDRO MIGUEL GARCIA HERNANDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE MATTER HAS SETTLEED. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER NAOMI ADELSON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
